metaDescription: Meet the team at A Cut Above Barber Shop in San Clemente: owner Kristy Rogers, co-owner DeAndre James, Heather Bravo, Mario Gonzalez, and Rafa. Each barber brings their own specialty so you can choose the right fit for your style.

header.title: Meet the barbers.
header.subtitle: At A Cut Above, our team brings experience, precision, and passion to every cut. Each barber has their own specialty — click any name to see their full portfolio.

dropBy.headingSuffix: to book with your preferred barber.
dropBy.subtitle: Or stop by 1006 S. El Camino Real, Suite A, San Clemente, CA 92672.

detail.emptyPortfolioMessage: {firstName}'s portfolio is coming soon. In the meantime, see the full shop gallery for examples of our work.
